description: The Expediency Discernment Council of the System (Majma'-e Tashkhis-e Maslahat-e Nezam) was established by [Khomeini](/people/ruhollah-khomeini) in 1988 to resolve legislative disputes between the [Majlis](/orgs/islamic-consultative-assembly) and [Guardian Council](/orgs/guardian-council). It also acts as an advisory body to the Supreme Leader. Membership is appointed by the Supreme Leader and typically includes former presidents, senior clerics, and military figures, making it a powerful gathering point for Iran's political elite.
editorial_notes: Chaired by Rafsanjani 1989–2017, then Sadegh Amoli Larijani 2017–2022, then Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf from 2022.
